Form Factor In Ear

About this item

  • ULTRA-LIGHTWEIGHT & ZERO-PRESSURE FIT: Built for the long haul, these wireless earbuds weigh a mere 0.11 oz—lighter than a sheet of paper. Whether it’s back-to-back Zoom calls, deep-focus study sessions, or an all-day podcast streak, you’ll forget you’re even wearing them. While others deal with ear fatigue, you’ll stay comfortable. Unlike silicone ear buds, our ergonomic semi-in-ear design lets your ears breathe. No pressure, no "plugged-up" feeling—just pure, effortless listening
  • SLEEK, POCKET-SIZED & COMMUTER-READY: Ditch the bulk and bulging pockets. Smaller than a car key, DB Soundpods fit into your tightest jeans or tiniest clutch. From morning commutes to dog walks, these bluetooth earbuds blend into your rhythm. More than just tech, they’re a minimalist essential. With an IPX5 waterproof, these wireless headphones handle rain and sweat with ease—perfect for the modern professional on the go
  • 25H PLAYTIME & SMART LED DISPLAY: Nothing kills the vibe like a "low battery" alert when you’re ready to zone out. Our LED display ends the guessing game, telling you exactly when it’s time to charge. These earbuds pack 5 hours of play—25 total with the case. They aren't just bluetooth headphoness; they’re your escape from the hustle. With these wireless bluetooth earbuds, your music is always on when you need to disappear into the sound
  • INSTANT PAIRING & TOUCH CONTROL: Stop waiting for that "Searching..." screen. With Bluetooth 5.3, DB Soundpods headphones the second you flip the lid. Whether you're juggling luggage at a busy airport or multitasking at home, stay hands-free. These earbuds wireless features let you skip tracks or take calls with a simple tap—phone stays in your pocket. With these earphones, it’s not just tech; it’s your life in sync
  • BALANCED SOUND & CLEAR CALL: Savor the rich, balanced sound of our custom-tuned 13mm drivers. From the warm texture of a narrator’s voice to the crisp detail of every high note, these earbuds wireless bluetooth offer a front-row experience for your favorite podcasts and audiobooks. With high-sensitivity mics, your voice carries clearly on every call—exactly how it should be

    About this Item

    • ULTRA-LIGHTWEIGHT & ZERO-PRESSURE FIT: Built for the long haul, these wireless earbuds weigh a mere 0.11 oz—lighter than a sheet of paper. Whether it’s back-to-back Zoom calls, deep-focus study sessions, or an all-day podcast streak, you’ll forget you’re even wearing them. While others deal with ear fatigue, you’ll stay comfortable. Unlike silicone ear buds, our ergonomic semi-in-ear design lets your ears breathe. No pressure, no "plugged-up" feeling—just pure, effortless listening
    • SLEEK, POCKET-SIZED & COMMUTER-READY: Ditch the bulk and bulging pockets. Smaller than a car key, DB Soundpods fit into your tightest jeans or tiniest clutch. From morning commutes to dog walks, these bluetooth earbuds blend into your rhythm. More than just tech, they’re a minimalist essential. With an IPX5 waterproof, these wireless headphones handle rain and sweat with ease—perfect for the modern professional on the go
    • 25H PLAYTIME & SMART LED DISPLAY: Nothing kills the vibe like a "low battery" alert when you’re ready to zone out. Our LED display ends the guessing game, telling you exactly when it’s time to charge. These earbuds pack 5 hours of play—25 total with the case. They aren't just bluetooth headphoness; they’re your escape from the hustle. With these wireless bluetooth earbuds, your music is always on when you need to disappear into the sound

    • BALANCED SOUND & CLEAR CALL: Savor the rich, balanced sound of our custom-tuned 13mm drivers.     Product Description

    Perfect for energetic men and women, this gift is loved by sports enthusiasts and daily commuters. With a 25 hour ultra long battery life, it eliminates battery anxiety, while the clear battery level display lets you check power status at a glance. IPX5 waterproof rating makes it fearless of sweat and rain, and the touch controls allow super convenient song switching and call answering. It pairs automatically upon opening the box, so you can enjoy clear vocals and dynamic rhythms immediately. The lightweight design ensures comfort for all-day use—a thoughtful, practical, yet fashionable gift that keeps music with you anytime, anywhere.
